title: QUIZ — battle workbench
subtitle: Three-zone workbench: posture (what's happening), battle log (what just happened), move palette (what you do next).

regions.label: POSTURE CARD
regions.note: Pink-bordered tile in the top-right. Kicker tag, bold name, 2-line blurb. Single source of truth for the next decision.

regions.label: BATTLE LOG
regions.note: Italic intro line, bold opener, phase intro. Right-aligned 'Turn 1' = persistent state badge. Latest entry at the bottom.

regions.label: PALETTE HEADER · KICKER LEFT, LIVE HINT RIGHT
STRONG MOVE
regions.note: Green badge + green border + 'STRONG VS …' chip. Three independent visual cues converge on the optimal pick.

regions.label: NEUTRAL MOVE
regions.note: Same chassis, purple badge, gray chip. Lower information density says 'fine, but uninspired.'

regions.label: WEAK MOVE
regions.note: Pink border + 'WEAK VS …' chip. Same chassis preserves comparability; the color is the warning.
